summary:
Sudden jerking should be avoided as it can cause unnecessary pain; instead, gently rock the impression back into place before carefully lifting using supportive techniques that prevent seal disruption during extraction for optimal care without causing harm.
The most effective method appears to involve immediate breakage of any set areas by inserting fingers quickly followed by cautious upward pressure supported at multiple points along its base after initial repositioning through light rocking motions within the oral cavity prior to complete setting time elapsing fully. This approach ensures no additional stressors are applied once hardened material becomes more brittle but still flexible enough not yet completely rigidified throughout full curing period necessary The most effective method appears to involve immediate breakage of any set areas by inserting fingers quickly followed by cautious upward pressure supported at multiple points along its base after initial repositioning through light rocking motions within the oral cavity prior to complete setting time elapsing fully.
